meta.title: Prudentia Micro Dental Care
meta.description: Discreet and comfortable teeth straightening with clear aligners in Pimple Saudagar

hero.title: Dental Crowns & Bridges at Prudentia Micro Dental Care
hero.subtitle: Dental Care

introduction.text: When a tooth has suffered significant damage whether due to decay, trauma, or root canal treatment restoring its strength, shape, and function becomes essential. At Prudentia Micro Dental Care, we offer advanced crowns and bridges that combine cutting-edge technology with the highest standards of quality and aesthetics.

crowns.title: What Is a Dental Crown?
crowns.description: A dental crown is a custom-made cap that covers the entire surface of a weakened or damaged tooth. It restores:

features.title: Strength
features.description: to support chewing and biting forces

features.title: Aesthetics
features.description: to match your natural teeth beautifully

technology.title: Advanced Technology & Materials
technology.description: We work with ISO-certified international labs to craft crowns using:

items.title: MLS Techniques
items.description: Metal Laser Sintered for enhanced strength

items.title: Premium Materials
items.description: metal alloys, ceramics, E-max, and more

technology.highlight: Every patient receives a same-day temporary crown to protect the tooth and ensure stability until the final crown is ready.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us for Your Crowns?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We use high-magnification dental microscopes to ensure:

features.title: 30x magnified inspections
features.description: to fine-tune every detail of your restoration

whyChooseUs.highlight: This attention to detail dramatically reduces food lodgment, improves gum health, and minimizes the risk of recurrent decay giving your crown and tooth a longer life.

bridges.title: What Is a Dental Bridge?
bridges.description: A dental bridge replaces one or more missing teeth by anchoring to neighboring healthy teeth (or implants) with crowns. Bridges:
features: Maintain the integrity of your bite
bridges.closingText: They're an excellent option, especially when surrounding teeth require crowns themselves allowing for a comprehensive restoration that strengthens your entire smile.

features.title: Seamless integration for natural look and feel

cta.title: Think You May Need a Crown or Bridge?
cta.description: Whether you're dealing with a damaged tooth, a missing one, or an old crown that just doesn't fit right — we're here to help. Let us restore your confidence, function, and smile.
cta.callToAction: Call Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar today to schedule a consultation. We'll guide you every step of the way toward a healthy, lasting solution.
cta.highlightedText: Prudentia Micro Dental Care, Pimple Saudagar
